subject: npmx Weekly #10
headline: npmx Weekly #10
intro: Exciting updates are here! Read on for key highlights about our recent conference, trust policy enhancements, and user experience improvements.

topics.title: npmx Conference Highlights
topics.summary: The recent conference featured engaging presentations, particularly from @npmx.dev, receiving positive feedback and fostering a lively atmosphere. Attendees shared their experiences, marking the event as a success.

topics.title: Trust Policy Enhancements
topics.summary: Discussions have emphasized the need for better visibility and preventability in package management. The integration of @pnpm.io and @npmx.dev aims to enhance user trust and security during installations.

topics.title: User Experience Research Findings
topics.summary: Recent research revealed a strong preference for a light mode, leading to the decision to remove the dark theme from npmx. This change, supported by 97% of users, aims to optimize usability and consistency across the platform.
